name: Marta Ileana Badea
headline: Senior telecom engineer for operator-scale network planning and delivery quality.
summary: I bring 15+ years across wireless and transport networks for major operator environments including Telefónica and Vodafone Germany. My work spans fixed network planning, mobile backhaul, microwave coordination, RAN operations, integration, troubleshooting, validation, signaling, protocols and end-to-end service delivery. I am strongest where planning quality, vendor coordination, technical approval and live-network readiness all matter.
strengths: Review, correction and approval of operator work packs across WDM, router, carrier, swap and delete scopes
Fixed network planning for deployment, swap, upgrade, capacity change and decommissioning programs
Microwave coordination with LOS delivery, EP/AP plan adjustment, link design, acceptance and RIFU lifecycle checks
RAN integration, configuration, rehoming, rollout support and degradation monitoring across Huawei 2G, 3G and 4G systems
Escalation handling, quality assurance and point-of-contact work across operator, vendor and external partner teams
Multilingual technical delivery in English, French, German and Romanian across multinational and multi-site environments

experience.title: Fixed Network Planning Coordinator
bullets: Coordinates the technical interface between Telefónica and Alten teams for the NSX BHP Germany project.
Reviews, corrects and approves work packs for Telefónica South and West regions across WDM, router, carrier new, swap and delete scopes.
Performs infrastructure checks, rack design, hardware list acceptance and proactive quality checks before implementation.
Identifies and resolves technical planning issues with engineering partners to protect delivery quality.

experience.title: Fixed Network Planning Engineer
bullets: Created and updated network High Level Design plans and documentation according to customer demands.
Supported the Backhaul Planning Team Nord East, including DTAG Delta LL decommissioning and router performance analysis.
Checked trunks and planning parameters in APT and Xakta for network change readiness.
Created Netsite projects for new deployments, swaps, upgrades and capacity changes across multiple network elements.

experience.title: Microwave Coordinator Engineer
bullets: Acted as point of contact between Vodafone, DNOC, Säntis and external partners.
Managed escalations and quality assurance for delivered services.
Coordinated LOS activities with focus on delivering target links.
Evaluated and adjusted EP and AP plans, designed links in IQLINK and updated Cramer Mobile documentation.
Checked microwave link acceptance and RIFU element lifecycle, with TTWOS reporting for Säntis activities.

experience.title: QA Engineer
bullets: Performed end-to-end regression testing for DTAG SMS-C platforms.
Validated SMPP, UCP, MAP and Diameter protocol functionality.
Participated in validation and verification for new software releases.
Worked with automated test environments using Cucumber, Java, GitHub and Jenkins.

experience.title: Microwave Network Planning Engineer
bullets: Designed microwave links for new, swap and upgrade projects according to Telefónica specifications.
Prepared link budgets and frequency applications for the German regulatory authority BNetzA.
Handled rack design and link rerouting for merged O2 and E-Plus networks.

experience.title: RAN Huawei Engineer
bullets: Troubleshot incident tickets and monitored network degradation for Huawei 2G, 3G and 4G systems.
Performed integration, configuration and rehoming activities for 2G, 3G and 4G networks.
Supported rollout and commissioning projects for new radio sites.
Collaborated with planning, field service and operations teams and supported BSC, RNC, NodeB and eNodeB software upgrades.

experience.title: FO RAN Engineer and Telecom Research Trainee
bullets: Monitored alarms and managed incidents for Huawei 2G, 3G, Ericsson TN and Andrew repeater networks for Mobistar Belgium.
Studied device-to-device communication with distributed caching in LTE-Advanced at Supélec.
Created and simulated MATLAB scenarios and analyzed wireless system performance using stochastic geometry.

projects.name: Telefónica Germany Fixed Network Planning
projects.description: Planning, approval and coordination work across German fixed network programs involving WDM, router, carrier, swap, delete, upgrade and capacity-change scopes.
bullets: Reviews and approves implementation-facing planning work across operator regions.
Coordinates between engineering partners, customer demands and field-ready network design.
Works across Huawei, Cisco, ZTE and ADVA equipment families.

projects.name: Vodafone Säntis Microwave Program
projects.description: Microwave delivery coordination between Vodafone, DNOC, Säntis and external partners with emphasis on escalation handling, quality assurance, LOS delivery and link acceptance.
bullets: Coordinated LOS delivery and plan adjustment for target microwave links.
Managed acceptance checks and lifecycle tracking for microwave links and RIFU elements.
Maintained network documentation and reporting for delivery activities.

projects.name: DTAG E2E SMSC Validation
projects.description: End-to-end testing and release validation for SMS-C platforms, including protocol-level validation and automated test environments.
bullets: Validated telecom protocol functionality across regression test cycles.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on defect tracking and resolution.
Worked with Java, Cucumber, GitHub and Jenkins in automated test environments.

projects.name: LTE-Advanced D2D Research
projects.description: Supélec research project on device-to-device communication with distributed caching in LTE-Advanced.
bullets: Created and simulated wireless communication scenarios in MATLAB.
Analyzed performance and optimized results using stochastic geometry.
Completed the work as part of an advanced wireless systems double master program.

education.details: Double Master diploma in Advanced Wireless Systems, scholarship student, 2012 - 2013
Double Master diploma in Electronics, Telecommunications and Information Technology, major in Mobile Communications, 2011 - 2012
Bachelor diploma in Electronics, Telecommunications and Information Technology, major in Telecom, 2007 - 2011
